open_master_plans.title: Legacy Frontend Decommission Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Remove the current multi-route legacy frontend and converge development onto a Vision-first frontend model while the product is still in dev phase and no real users depend on the legacy screens.

open_master_plans.title: Legacy Purge Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Remove the remaining legacy `workmarket` naming and documentation surface from the product where it is still active, while preserving the current `vision` UX, backend capability model, and chat surface.

open_master_plans.title: Vision Context Memory Expansion Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Give `/vision` a backend-owned memory layer that separates stable user context, current session context, and turn-level context so the orchestrator can handle multi-topic conversation shifts without flattening everything into one prompt blob.

open_master_plans.title: Backend Drift Remediation Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Keep the source-of-truth, docs, generated audits, and backend code aligned while reducing the remaining oversized or mixed-responsibility backend surfaces.

open_master_plans.title: Backend Model Standardization Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Make backend transport models and service layers look and behave the same across domains unless there is a clear domain-specific reason not to.

open_plans.title: Vision God Plan
open_plans.goal: Coordinate the long-running `/vision` program across multiple master plans while keeping current implementation reality visible.

open_plans.title: Vision Context Memory User And Session Plan
open_plans.goal: Add a backend-owned memory context to `/vision` that carries stable user context, current session context, and recent turn context into semantic understanding.

open_plans.title: Agent Model Feature Coverage Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-AGENT-MODEL-FEATURE-COVERAGE-AUDIT` to report code features not yet linked to the agent operating model or simulation surface.

open_plans.title: Aggregate Dead Code Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-AGGREGATE-DEAD-CODE-AUDIT` as one wrapper that runs dead-code audits and emits a compact merged summary.

recent_complete_plans.title: Active Plan Index Master Plan
recent_complete_plans.goal: Make active plans, master plans, and nearby closeout state easier to find at a glance through one compact

recent_complete_plans.title: Agent Surface Standardization Master Plan
recent_complete_plans.goal: Standardize the shared orchestration model behind:

recent_complete_plans.title: Codex Implementation Reliability Master Plan
recent_complete_plans.goal: Clean up and standardize the Codex control surface so implementation work becomes faster, more precise, more accurate, and more reliable.

recent_complete_plans.title: Control System Machine Optimization Master Plan
recent_complete_plans.goal: Make the control system easier to start, easier to refresh, and more machine-readable so broad implementation work can

recent_complete_plans.title: Machine-Readable-First Docs Master Plan
recent_complete_plans.goal: Make machine-readable operational and control files the primary source of truth for active behavior, planning state, and validation state, while keeping human-readable docs as derived summaries or curated narrative where needed.

next_action: Use `make codex-context topic=<topic> intent='<intent>'` for topic-specific broad work once this control snapshot is fresh.
